blockingIssues.description: Login creates sessions without enforcing banned-user rejection and can_view_site gating, so required RBAC auth constraints are not fully implemented.
`/users/profile` (empty username case) is not implemented to redirect as required and currently falls to 404.
Required account route `/users/account` is missing; implementation uses `/account`, creating contract mismatch.
Required API endpoint `GET /api/users/:username` is missing; implementation uses `GET /api/users/profile/:username`.
VAL-USER-052 behavior (extra profile fields/date formatting path) is not implemented in current profile API/UI.
Throttle policy is implemented as 3→30s, 5→60s, 10→lockout instead of required 3→1s, 10→2s, 20→5s within 24h.
Throttled requests return immediate 429 responses rather than applying timed delays expected by VAL-USER-071/072/073 timing checks.
Milestone tests currently assert the wrong throttle policy, so coverage is misaligned with the feature contract.
Create/update writes do not validate referenced `userGroup` existence before DB write, allowing FK-driven server errors instead of controlled validation responses.
DELETE allows removal of the last admin account and does not enforce the last-admin invariant already used in update demotion logic.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require completed features to include traceable worker linkage (`workerSessionIds` and `completedWorkerSessionId`) before scrutiny runs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple completed user-management features (`rbac-enforcement`, `public-profile-account`, `failed-login-tracking`) had no linked worker session or handoff, reducing auditability.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align documented account/profile route conventions with active mission contracts (e.g., `/users/account` and `/api/users/:username`) to prevent implementation drift.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Shared docs and mission contract currently disagree with implementation route shapes, which contributed to scrutiny-detected contract mismatches.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify how strict red/green test-first and mandatory UI-test expectations should adapt for refinement-only sessions while still requiring validator coverage and rationale.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Two passing review reports (`user-notes`, `user-groups-crud`) flagged procedure rigidity as mismatched with accepted polish/fix workflows.

rejectedObservations.observation: Milestone tests do not cover banned-user and can_view_site RBAC auth paths.
rejectedObservations.reason: Captured as feature-specific blocking issue in this round; not promoted as shared-state change.

rejectedObservations.observation: Shared docs should explicitly state the last-admin preservation invariant.
rejectedObservations.reason: Potentially useful but overlaps existing feature-level defects and would need orchestrator policy decision on canonical location.
